name: @rogerchappel/tool-demo-script
description: Create runnable demo scripts and narration from a CLI repo, then verify the commands still work.

scripts.smoke: bin/tool-demo-script.js demo --repo fixtures/fixture-cli --out /tmp/tool-demo-script-fixture-demo.md && bin/tool-demo-script.js verify /tmp/tool-demo-script-fixture-demo.md --repo fixtures/fixture-cli

author: Roger Chappel
